TitleCard_Subtext: For the next 60 days, declare your devices for free. After this period, registration and fees will apply for all devices entering the country.
IMEICheck_Subtext2: Enter IMEI to the field below and click Check IMEI
IMEIVerify_Subtext: Check if your device's IMEI is valid and compliant before declaring it
DeviceInfo_Valid: This device is valid and already registered.
DeviceInfo_Unregistered: This device is valid but not registered. Please proceed with the declaration to be able to use it.
DeviceInfo_Invalid: This device is not valid and might be counterfeit. Make sure you entered the IMEI correctly.
DeviceInfo_IMEIs: IMEIs that belong to the device
DeviceInfo_IssuesMessage: No issues detected. The device is not blacklisted.
CompliantCard_Header: How to Stay Compliant with RCIT
CompliantCard_SubText1: Ensure your device is eligible for declaration by using the IMEI verification tool.
AboutCard_Summary: The Central Equipment Identity Register (RCIT) ensures that all devices entering the country are legitimate, secure, and compliant with regulations.
AboutCard_SubText1: All devices must be declared within the next 60 days to avoid fees.
AboutCard_SubText2: Ensure your devices meet regulatory standards.
AboutCard_SubText3: After the declaration period, registration and fees will be required.
DeclareCard_SubText1: Declare your devices at no cost for the next 60 days
DeclareCard_SubText2: Ensure your devices are legitimate and compliant
DeclareCard_SubText3: Importers can declare multiple devices through bulk uploads
FAQ_SubText1: A temporary period allowing free device declarations. After this, registration and fees will apply for new devices.
FAQ_SubHeader2: Who needs to declare their devices?
FAQ_SubHeader4: How do I declare multiple devices?
FAQ_SubHeader5: What should I do if my IMEI is invalid?
SupportCard_SubText: If you need assistance with the declaration process or have questions, contact us:

Status_ROLE_IMPORTEREnabledSubText: Your account was approved by our team, you can begin declaring your devices.
Status_ROLE_IMPORTERPendingSubText: Your importer account is under review. You'll be notified once approved.
Status_ROLE_IMPORTERRejectedSubText: Your account has been rejected, please contact support to resolve any conflicts.
